response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering leadership and distributed-systems expertise, particularly in real-time systems and microservices, which aligns with key technical requirements. However, his experience with multi-agent AI systems appears limited to recent contributions at re:cinq, and lacks the 5+ years of direct production experience with agentic AI in regulated environments required for this role. His fintech and credit-risk exposure is minimal, and while his technical breadth is impressive, there is no clear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or designing AI-native fintech integrations like real-time credit risk or working-capital management.
strengths: Demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time processing (e.g., Dunnhumby media, GISCollective)
Strong engineering leadership track record, including DevOps, CI/CD, and team scaling (e.g., Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
Proven ability to learn new domains quickly and contribute to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., re:cinq, MCP code generators)
concerns: Limited direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production (only recent re:cinq contributions, no fintech/regulated environments)
Minimal exposure to fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working-capital, embedded finance) or AI-native financial integrations
No evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or designing governance frameworks for hybrid engineering models
